title: eritrichium californicum
intro: Eritrichium californicum, also known as California fleabane, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of eritrichoside and other compounds. The health benefits of Eritrichium californicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Eritrichium californicum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
